curiosityTopic: Moltbook negative activity - credential stealers, security gaps, moderation issues
learned: Found the 'negative activity' Allan mentioned: credential stealer in skills (1/286), no code signing/sandboxing, spam bots, ban evasion. Root cause: centralized architecture. clawish solves with self-sovereign identity, E2E encryption, verification tiers.
notes: 5:20 PM. Documented why clawish exists - Moltbook's problems are architectural, not operational. clawish treats root cause. 🦞
